feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delta configurationfor Standard API in S/4 HANA cloud
entry.content:
In order to Create Delta for standard API:

Go to product master standard API in Business Accelerator Hub then click on tryout option.

 

Now, we have to configure our system environment here as shown below

 

 

 

 

 

And after successfully configuring Now you can tryout any of these operations in Standard API

 

Now in order to get delta, we have to take a delta pointer based on the fields in standard API. In this case I’m taking Lastchangedate field as delta pointer

 

And Filter out records based on delta pointer(Lastchangedate)as shown below

 

Here the logic is:   LastChangeDate ge datetime'2024-01-14T00:00:00’ And it says lastchangedate is greater than or equals to 2024-01-14 and also there are other logics as well: LastChangeDate ge datetime'2024-06-13T00:00:00' and LastChangeDate lt datetime'2024-06-14T00:00:00' and it only gives records between 14th june to 13th june .

So After initializing this logic run as shown below

 

we get records that are changed on or after 14th January 2024 in OData URL itself and it gives count of how many records are present as shown below

 

Now we can check data by taking URL till highlighted part and run OData in PowerBI

Now in Power BI, Select OData feed and add the required URL

And we can see required delta records here

entry.title: Uploading Vectors to Hana Cloud with CAP, NodeJS
entry.content:
Hi there,
So i am working on a SAP CAP node.js app running on SAP BTP CloudFoundry Environment, in which i am struggling to Implement Editing or Creating Entitities containing Vectors using CDS QL.

Let me explain this with a example:

Schema.cds

 

entity ExampleEntity:cuid,managed{
Product:Integer;
ProductDescription:String; 
Vector:Vector(3);
}

 

A Query like this will work just fine and the syntax is documented [1]

let oResult= await SELECT.from('ExampleEntity')
  .where`cosine_similarity(Vector, to_real_vector(${embedding})) > 0.9`

But what about a Insert?
The Offcial Documentation [2] of SAP HANA CLOUD shows me this syntax in SQL.

 

CREATE TABLE VECTORTAB (ID INT, V REAL_VECTOR(3));
INSERT INTO VECTORTAB VALUES (1, TO_REAL_VECTOR('[2,3,5]'));

 

I've tried to adapt this to CAP Syntax with no luck so far.

 

 let oResult = await INSERT.into(ExampleEntity).entries({
        ID: sID,
        ...other fields,
        Vector: `to_real_vector('[2,3,5]')`,
      })

 

While this is what id expect the syntax to be like i receive this error: (keep in mind this is a cds validation error not a sql error)
[error] - 500 > {
'@Common.numericSeverity': 4,
code: '500',
message: 'Cannot set parameter at row: 1. Wrong input for BINARY type'
}
Indicating that vector structure only works on filter and sort conditions, maybe there is a way to create the binary buffer in nodejs? Or is the syntax i've tried so far just wrong?

The only thing working is rawdogging SQL inside of my CAP Custom handler, which is possible, but not really pretty.

 

let oResult = await cds.run(
  `INSERT INTO ch_company_productname_tablename
  (ID,...,Vector) 
  VALUES ('${sID}',...,TO_REAL_VECTOR('${vector}'))`
);

 


Any advice or suggestions would be appreciated
Sources:
[1] https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-hana#vector-embeddings
[2] https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-vector-engine-guide/inserting-updating-and-deleting-vectors

entry.title: Service broker error: Service broker dbaas-broker failed
entry.content:
Hello Folks, 

I'm facing issue with starting the hana service instance getting the below error.

"Service broker error: Service broker dbaas-broker failed with: DBaaS SB update service instance: Lifecycle operations are currently disabled for your account. If you believe this is an error, please report a ticket on component HAN-CLS-DB. - Bad Request"

I have already tried updating the hana service instance both from cf cli and BTP 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: "You cannot obtain the access token, contact your administrator" Error on SAP B1 10.0
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I currently have SAP B1 in version 10.0 for HANA (10.00.220) SP 2308 in my company and we have a problem, every so often (1 week perhaps) out of nowhere it appears "You cannot obtain the access token, contact your administrator" in this case we have instructions on the linux server to do a total restart of services so that we can return to operations but we could not find the reason for this incident, and actually we even checked in HANA Studio if everything is running as it should but it is not we managed to find the solution to this incident

As an additional note, if users try to log in automatically they are not allowed to enter and are sent back to choose the company, we really doubt if there is something wrong with the installation and we need to reinstall or if we have to review something about the connections between hana and SAP

Could someone help me know why it could be generated or if it is a version issue and we need to wait for an update patch?

entry.title: Dynamic hide fields in my RAP model of custom entities
entry.content: I'm having trouble dynamically hiding fields in my RAP model using custom entities. I have a requirement involving 100 fields, and I need to display data based on certain conditions from different tables. For each table, I want to control which fields are shown in both the line item and object page. How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Issue with FB65 Correspondence Run in SAP - Assistance Required
entry.content:
I am writing to seek your expertise regarding an issue I encountered while processing a debit entry in transaction FB65 within SAP.

During the transaction, I entered a debit entry involving two line items, each corresponding to a different GL account. After running the correspondence and printing the report, I observed that the report displayed the amount for only one of the GL accounts. However, the total amount reflected in the report is the combined amount of both GL accounts.

Could you please assist in resolving this discrepancy? Specifically, I need guidance on ensuring that the amounts for both GL accounts are correctly displayed in the correspondence report.

entry.title: "You cannot obtain the access token, contact your administrator" Error on SAP B1 10.0 Help
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I currently have SAP B1 in version 10.0 for HANA (10.00.220) SP 2308 in my company and we have a problem, every so often (1 week perhaps) out of nowhere it appears "You cannot obtain the access token, contact your administrator" in this case we have instructions on the linux server to do a total restart of services so that we can return to operations but we could not find the reason for this incident, and actually we even checked in HANA Studio if everything is running as it should but it is not we managed to find the solution to this incident

As an additional note, if users try to log in automatically they are not allowed to enter and are sent back to choose the company, we really doubt if there is something wrong with the installation and we need to reinstall or if we have to review something about the connections between hana and SAP

Could someone help me know why it could be generated or if it is a version issue and we need to wait for an update patch?

I Heard about uninstall de SAP servertools as solution but i want see all the options available

SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: How to Push Data from SAP Datasphere Back to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have successfully established a connection between SAP S/4HANA and SAP Datasphere, allowing me to fetch data from SAP S/4HANA into SAP Datasphere. In SAP Datasphere, I am performing ETL operations to clean and transform the data. Now, I need to push the transformed data back into SAP S/4HANA.

Here's a brief overview of my process:

  1. Data Extraction: I am extracting data from Table1 in SAP S/4HANA and l oading it into SAP Datasphere.
  2. ETL Operations: In SAP Datasphere, I am performing various ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) operations to clean and transform the data.
  3. Data Transformation Result: The result of the ETL operations is a new table, Table2, in SAP Datasphere containing the cleaned and transformed data.
  4. Data Pushback Requirement: Now, I need to push Table2 from SAP Datasphere back into SAP S/4HANA.

My Questions:

  1. What are the steps to push data back to SAP S/4HANA from SAP Datasphere?
  2. Are there any best practices or recommended methods for this process?
  3. What tools or features in SAP Datasphere facilitate the data pushback to SAP S/4HANA?

Additional Context:

  • The connection between SAP S/4HANA and SAP Datasphere is already established and working for data extraction.
  • I need to ensure that the data in Table2 in SAP Datasphere is accurately and efficiently pushed back to a new table in SAP S/4HANA.

Any guidance, detailed steps, or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Crave Infotech

entry.title: inspection type is 01 and inspection lot origin is 17 is this stock relevant for UD
entry.content: Here i have a scenario where inspection type is 01 and inspection lot origin is 17 but this is not stock relevant for UD. Can anyone explain standard process for this also what can be done to make this stock relevant for UD

entry.title: Generate one intervention report for group checkout
entry.content:
Hello 

I'm trying to create a BR that make me generate one intervention report for group checkout 

Can anyone help me to create this Business Rule ?

Thank you

entry.title: CAP: calling an action in a remote service not going through
entry.content:
I'm consuming a remote service that has entity sets and multiple actions. I am able to query a projection on that service and get a list of entities. But once I try to use an action that creates a new entity, the backend code is never called.  I followed this tutorial to invoke the action.

await srv.send('create_entity',dataObject)

When that didn't work, I thought maybe the 'send' function wasn't properly being used, so I added the method like in this code snippet. 

bupa.send({
  method: 'POST',
  path: create_entity,
  data: dataObject
})

This time I got an error telling me that the csrf token was missing. I followed this tutorial to add csrf handling, but the error remained.   

"cds": {
    "requires": {
        "REMOTE_SERVICE": {
            "kind": "odata",
            "model": "srv/external/REMOTE_SERVICE",
            "csrf": true,
            "csrfInBatch": true
        }
    }
}

Is there a problem with the remote service that I'm consuming? Is there a sample project that consumes a remote service action?

Thanks!

entry.title: Maintenance Notification Workflow
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am new to Workflow and need guidance on the below requirement. How exactly am I going to achieve it.

  1. If X Role creates a notification with the breakdown indicator checked the no approval is needed to create a work order. X Role himself will create the work order
  2. If X Role creates a notification without the breakdown indicator checked then approval is needed to create a work order. X Role will not be able to create the work order
  3. If Y Role  creates a notification  with/without the breakdown indicator then approval is needed to create the work order. The Z role  will be able to create the Work order

The above need is for S4Hana

Regards

Deepak D

entry.title: VPN Connection Information
entry.content:
We are in the process of onboarding a customer to SAP, and while the deal is closed and the PPF stage is in progress, the customer has a few queries about VPN connections. 
 
Currently, the customer is using the Forticlient Tool for VPN connections. Below are the queries raised for the VPN Connection:
  1. Is it possible to add a new connection specifically for SAP applications?
  2. If a new VPN connection is required, will there be any associated costs?
  3. Can the primary location user access the SAP application without connecting to the VPN, with only remote users needing to connect via VPN to access SAP applications.

Request your help in addressing these queries for the customer.

entry.title: Subcription to SAP HANA Cloud tools was failed
entry.content: i have active BTP trail coount, but subscription to sap hana cloud tools was failed. why?

entry.title: Automating Schema Name Management in CI/CD for CAP Applications
entry.content:
In our CAP application, we need to explicitly set the schema name generated by the application. We've achieved this by defining the schema name in the mta.yaml file as follows:

 

- name: MY_APP-db
  type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
  parameters:
    config:
      schema: MY_SCHEMA
    service: hana
    service-plan: hdi-shared

 

However, since our Dev and QA environments share the same HANA Cloud instance, we face an issue where the schema name must be unique across deployments.

Is there a streamlined CI/CD approach, perhaps using SAP's official CI/CD Service, to automate the use of different schema names for QA? How can we avoid manually adjusting the mta.yaml file before each deployment?

entry.title: Freight Cost Allocation Do not Created after "Accrual Posting " in Freight Order TM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using S4 HANA Public Cloud TM solution for our client. 6W2, 6W3 AND 6W4 is activated for this.

As per my understanding, After Accrual posting, the system is extected to create below document:

1. Freight Cost allocation 2. PO 3. Servie Entry Sheet 

I am able to create the SO -> Freight Unit -> Freight Order -> Delivery

But during the "Montior Accrual Posting" I am able post the document in the app but the no Freight Cost calculation document is getting generated.

Fiori App Used - Monitor Accrual Postings

 

Additionally, I check the manage purchase Order APP - THe PO is getting created in background but no entry sheet.

entry.title: Incident management
entry.content:
hello expert 

  1. PSE Tier 1 & 2 ( process safety event ) 
  2. A Level 1 Process Safety Event (PSE Tier 1) is a primary containment loss (LOPC) with the most severe consequences. On the other hand, a Level 2 process security event (PSE Tier 2) is also a LOPC, but with less consequences. These classifications are used to report unplanned or uncontrolled events.
  3. A Tier 1 Process Safety Event (T-1 PSE) is a loss of primary containment (LOPC) with the greatest consequence as defined by API RP754. A T-1 PSE is an unplanned or uncontrolled release of any material, including non-toxic and non-flammable materials1 (e.g. steam, hot water, nitrogen, compressed CO2, or compressed air), from a process that results in one or more of the consequences
  4. The question is : Can PSE Tier1&2 be added to incident management because we need it in dashboard ? 
  5. the bast regard

entry.title: Fiori Migration Cockpit Error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later."
entry.content:
Our team has just moved from LTMC to the Fiori launchpad migration cockpit for data uploading. I have created a Migration project with three objects:

1) Object Classification - Material (MARA)

2) Product

3) Product - extend existing records by new org levels.

The issue we are facing is some unexplained error that occurs randomly at any stage for any object either when we click the Prepare or Simulate button it gives us the error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later." (Picture attached) and below that error, it gives a warning popup "Migration cockpit The preparation step has failed for one or more migration objects. Navigate to the "Monitoring" screen for details.".

But when we see in the Running activities or Monitoring tab nothing is running and it shows '0' in running activities. Sometimes no such error occurs and it let us upload the template smoothly with all steps but sometimes this error occurs randomly so we have to upload templates again and do turnarounds in order to load it.

All the pictures are attached for your reference please let me know how to resolve this issue so that we can upload all the templates smoothly without such errors.

Thanks

entry.title: crowd worforce generate registration link
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i'm trying to learn the crowd workforce , so i followed the instruction in SAP help and tried to generate a link for the registration but it didn't work, could anyone help me ?

thank you

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.
